message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Are document updates complete?">
All reviewers are now idle and fully aligned — 9/9 consensus confirmed. Are you finished incorporating the feedback into the documents? When you're done, please let me know so I can review the final versions and present PROJECT.md to the project owner for scope approval.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Yes, all document updates are complete. I finished incorporating all feedback two rounds ago. The documents are finalized and ready for your review and owner presentation.

The five modified files are:
- `PROJECT.md` -- V1 GTD scope (needs owner approval)
- `docs/gtd-product-discovery.md` -- full discovery document (status: APPROVED 9/9)
- `docs/user-stories.md` -- 8 GTD user stories with a11y sections
- `docs/glossary.md` -- GTD domain types (status: Approved)
- `docs/future-ideas.md` -- updated for V1

Ready when you are.
input.summary: Yes, all updates complete, ready for owner review

routing.summary: Yes, all updates complete, ready for owner review
